base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_candle — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Candle — blue (1/room) + red (unlimited) variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Candle — blue (1/room) + red (unlimited) variants; lights dark rooms + burns bushes
